name: Pugliese Beet Salad with Fresh Mint (Dean & Deluca)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil and cook beets until fork-tender, about 30 minutes for small beets.
2. Remove from boiling water and let cool enough to handle.
3. Slip off skins and slice beets into 1/4-inch thick pieces.
4. Whisk together vinegar, lemon juice, olive oil, coarse salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
5. Add sliced beets and toss thoroughly.
6. Gently fold in the shredded fresh mint.
7. Adjust seasoning if needed and serve at room temperature.
